ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team owner */,
  "team_funds" TEXT /* Total funds available for the team */,
  "team_league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the salary belongs to */,
  "base_salary" TEXT /* Base salary for the player */,
  "salary_year" INTEGER /* Year the salary is applicable for */,
  "bonus_amount" TEXT /* Any bonus amount for the player */,
  "performance_incentives" TEXT /* Performance-based incentives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cap_penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the penalty belongs to */,
  "penalty_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the cap penalty */,
  "penalty_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cap penalty */,
  "penalty_year" INTEGER /* Year the penalty is applicable for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cap_penalties_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the loan belongs to */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (incoming or outgoing) */,
  "loan_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the loan */,
  "loan_year" INTEGER /* Year the loan is applicable for */,
  "loan_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in years */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cap_space" (
  "cap_space_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cap space entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the cap space belongs to */,
  "available_cap" TEXT /* Available cap space for the team */,
  "cap_year" INTEGER /* Year the cap space is applicable for */,
  "projected_cap" TEXT /* Projected cap space for the next year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cap_space_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cap_space_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
